name: Rock & Roll Clams
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chili paste with soybean oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash clams in cool water; do not open them.
2. Heat oil and stir-fry garlic and chili paste until fragrant.
3. Add clams, then fish sauce and sugar; mix well.
4. Add mint and stock, cover, and cook until clams open.
If chili paste with soybean oil is unavailable, use Thai BBQ Sauce recipe.
